findings.evidence: `rg -n "def map|theorem map_|map_id|map_map" code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Subcomodule.lean` shows only `def map` at 218 plus `map_toSubmodule`, `map_le_iff`, `map_mono`, and `map_top_toSubmodule`; `code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Subcoalgebra/Map.lean` has the analogous `@[simp] theorem map_id` at 129 and `@[simp] theorem map_map` at 140, while `Comodule.Hom.id`/`comp` are available in `Comodule.lean` at 168 and 176.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` lemmas analogous to `Subcoalgebra.map_id` and `Subcoalgebra.map_map` (and the bottom image normal form if keeping parity with the existing top/bot API).
findings.issue: `Subcomodule.map` exposes an image construction but does not provide normal-form lemmas for identity/composition, so clients cannot rewrite images along `Comodule.Hom.id` or `Comodule.Hom.comp` abstractly.

summary: The range universal-property gap is fixed, but the public image-subcomodule API still lacks the normal functorial simp lemmas needed to use `map` without unpacking membership.
